content: Pattern for N concurrent Tasks from @MainActor: each Task { } spawned from @MainActor context inherits main actor isolation. @Published var jobs: [FilingJob] = [] on AppState. Spawn pattern: 1) append FilingJob to jobs array, 2) create Task (inherits @MainActor), 3) update jobs[idx].task. In Task body: call await onRunIssueFiling(), update jobs[idx] state on completion (already on @MainActor so no extra hop needed beyond the await). No task group needed for fire-and-forget concurrent filing — each Task is independent. The existing beginFiling() Task pattern is the single-job template; generalize by appending to array instead of setting captureState = .filing.
